goal: Yrkesroll: Packer/packager (ONET SOC 53-7064, Packers and Packagers, Hand). A Franka Panda packs three small items (0.04m cubes) from an infeed bin into an open cardboard box, then picks a flat lid cube and places it on top to seal the box. The open box is modelled by five Cube prims (one bottom plate + four upright walls, no lid) arranged into an enclosure on the work table; the lid stages on its own dedicated Cube next to the box. Each item is placed in a distinct interior cell (front-left / front-right / back-centre) to model packing layout, and the lid drop-target is computed from the box-walls geometry so it sits flush on top of the wall rim. Exercises Franka short-reach pick-place, multi-target drop_targets dispatch, and an explicit sealing phase that re-uses setup_pick_place_controller for the lid — distinct from CP-NEW-kit-prep-operator (which packs into slots on an open tray, no lid) and CP-NEW-palletizer-layer-stack (which uses a conveyor + grid layout, no enclosure walls).
thoughts:
Design rationale for CP-NEW-yrkesroll-packer-box-seal:

1) Yrkesroll framing — Packer / packager per ONET SOC 53-7064 (Packers and Packagers, Hand) — backlog entry yrkesroll-packer-box-seal-001 describes 'flap-fold and tape-seal sequence' with admittance compliance; here we ship the simpler pick_place rendering that the user task explicitly requested. The robot is a stand-in for the human packer's pack-and-close motions; the cardboard box is a 5-Cube enclosure rather than a deformable mesh (deformable_mesh + admittance are deferred per backlog blocker physx_instability).

2) Topology — single station on a 1.0×0.6×0.75m work table at origin. Robot Franka at [0, 0, 0.75]. Infeed bin at front-right [0.30, 0.30, 0.775] holding three 0.04m item cubes. Open box assembled at front-left [-0.25, 0.20, 0.775]: bottom plate + four walls forming an interior cavity ≈ 0.20×0.20×0.10m. Lid stash at [-0.25, -0.25, 0.825] is a flat 0.20×0.20×0.01m Cube. All workspace inside Franka 0.85m reach.

3) Open-box geometry — five Cube prims under /World/Box:
   - /World/Box/Bottom: scale=[0.10, 0.10, 0.005] at z=0.78 (top z=0.785). Interior 0.20×0.20m footprint.
   - /World/Box/WallFront: scale=[0.10, 0.005, 0.05] at [-0.25, 0.30, 0.835] (front wall at y=+0.30).
   - /World/Box/WallBack:  scale=[0.10, 0.005, 0.05] at [-0.25, 0.10, 0.835] (back wall at y=+0.10).
   - /World/Box/WallLeft:  scale=[0.005, 0.10, 0.05] at [-0.35, 0.20, 0.835].
   - /World/Box/WallRight: scale=[0.005, 0.10, 0.05] at [-0.15, 0.20, 0.835].
   Wall top z = 0.835 + 0.05 = 0.885. Lid drop z = 0.885 + lid_thickness/2 (0.005) = 0.890 — rests flush on wall rims.

4) Three items — 0.04m cubes inside infeed bin at z = 0.775 + bin_top(0.04) + item/2(0.02) = 0.835. Labels: Item_1 → 'electronics_widget', Item_2 → 'consumable_tube', Item_3 → 'sealed_bag'. Pack cells inside box (relative to box centre x=-0.25, y=+0.20):
   - Item_1 → [-0.30, 0.16, 0.820] (front-left cell)
   - Item_2 → [-0.20, 0.16, 0.820] (front-right cell)
   - Item_3 → [-0.25, 0.24, 0.820] (back-centre cell)
   Drop z = 0.785 (bottom top) + item/2(0.02) + clearance(0.015) = 0.820. Cells separated by ~0.08-0.10m centre-to-centre; 0.04m items have 0.04-0.06m clearance — safe for adjacent placement without contact-driven topple.

5) Lid — separate Cube at /World/Lid, scale=[0.10, 0.10, 0.005], position [-0.25, -0.25, 0.825] on the table. Same footprint as box interior (0.20×0.20m). define_grasp_pose flags it as a flat, top-grasp object (top_picks because lid is too wide for parallel-jaw side grip — Franka must approach from above using a wider gripper_width override at setup_pick_place_controller call). Drop target [-0.25, 0.20, 0.890] = box centre xy, z=wall-top + lid/2.

6) Two-phase pick-place sequencing:
   PHASE 1 — Pack items: setup_pick_place_controller with source_paths=[Item_1, Item_2, Item_3], destination_path=/World/Box, drop_targets={Item_1: [-0.30,0.16,0.820], Item_2: [-0.20,0.16,0.820], Item_3: [-0.25,0.24,0.820]}, planning_obstacles=[Table, Box walls, InfeedBin, Lid].
   PHASE 2 — Seal: a SECOND setup_pick_place_controller with source_paths=[/World/Lid], destination_path=/World/Box, drop_targets={/World/Lid: [-0.25, 0.20, 0.890]}, planning_obstacles=[Table, Box walls, InfeedBin]. Note: items now inside box are NOT obstacles — they are packed cargo; obstacle list excludes them so the lid descent does not collide-check against packed items (consistent with CP-NEW-machine-tender-load-unload dual-call pattern).

7) Physics — CPU dynamics (enable_gpu_dynamics=False, broadphase_type=MBP) for determinism. Item mass 0.05 kg; lid mass 0.10 kg (slightly heavier so gravity settles it flush on wall rim). rubber material on items + lid maximises friction-against-wall, minimises wobble after release. sleepThreshold=0.0 keeps everything simulated through both phases. Box walls have PhysicsCollisionAPI but NO RigidBodyAPI — they are static obstacles (box does not slide when items drop in).

8) Distinct structural tags: isaac:yrkesroll.packer (new yrkesroll-axis tag tying to ONET SOC 53-7064), isaac:industry.box_packing (new industry tag), isaac:operation.seal_lid (new operation tag for the sealing phase), isaac:robot.franka_panda, isaac:robot.fixed_base.arm, isaac:topology.single_station, isaac:source.single_bin, isaac:destination.enclosed_box.

9) Comparison to siblings:
   - vs CP-NEW-kit-prep-operator: that template packs 5 parts into 5 OPEN slots on a tray (no walls, no lid). This one packs 3 items into a WALLED enclosure and adds a sealing-with-lid phase.
   - vs CP-NEW-palletizer-layer-stack: that one uses a CONVEYOR + grid placement on an open pallet. This one is static-bin source + walled-box destination + lid finish.
   - vs CP-NEW-yrkesroll-machinist-cnc-load: shared dual-pick_place_controller shape (load + close-action), but the close-action here is a real pick-place (lid) rather than a set_attribute door-slide.

10) Verification — verify_args.stages encodes the two pick-place phases (items-pack, lid-seal). simulate_args.target_path = /World/Box; simulate_args.cube_paths = all 3 items + lid. settle_state records final positions of all 4 movables + the static box walls.
code:
# ── Scene skeleton ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
create_prim(prim_path="/World/DomeLight", prim_type="DomeLight")
set_attribute(prim_path="/World/DomeLight", attr_name="inputs:intensity", value=1000.0)
create_prim(prim_path="/World/Ground", prim_type="Cube", position=[0, 0, -0.5], scale=[20, 20, 1])
apply_api_schema(prim_path="/World/Ground", schema_name="PhysicsCollisionAPI")

# Robot work table (1.0 × 0.6 × 0.75m)
create_prim(prim_path="/World/Table", prim_type="Cube", position=[0, 0, 0.375], scale=[0.5, 0.3, 0.375])
apply_api_schema(prim_path="/World/Table", schema_name="PhysicsCollisionAPI")

# ── Physics scene: CPU dynamics for determinism ───────────────────────────────
set_physics_scene_config(config={"enable_gpu_dynamics": False, "broadphase_type": "MBP"})

# ── Franka Panda robot ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
# Reach ~0.85m. All scene elements within ~0.55m horizontal — safely inside envelope.
robot_wizard(
    robot_name="franka_panda",
    dest_path="/World/Franka",
    position=[0, 0, 0.75],
    orientation=[1, 0, 0, 0],
)

# ── Infeed bin (single source bin holding the three items) ───────────────────
# Bin top z = 0.775 + 0.04 = 0.815. Items rest at centre z = 0.835.
create_bin(
    prim_path="/World/InfeedBin",
    position=[0.30, 0.30, 0.775],
    size=[0.18, 0.12, 0.04],
)

# ── Open cardboard box (5-Cube enclosure: bottom + 4 walls, NO lid) ──────────
# Anchor centre xy = [-0.25, 0.20]. Interior 0.20×0.20m footprint.
# Bottom plate top z = 0.78 + 0.005 = 0.785. Wall top z = 0.835 + 0.05 = 0.885.
create_prim(
    prim_path="/World/Box",
    prim_type="Xform",
)
create_prim(
    prim_path="/World/Box/Bottom",
    prim_type="Cube",
    position=[-0.25, 0.20, 0.78],
    scale=[0.10, 0.10, 0.005],
)
apply_api_schema(prim_path="/World/Box/Bottom", schema_name="PhysicsCollisionAPI")
set_attribute(prim_path="/World/Box/Bottom", attr_name="primvars:displayColor", value=[[0.70, 0.50, 0.25]])

create_prim(
    prim_path="/World/Box/WallFront",
    prim_type="Cube",
    position=[-0.25, 0.30, 0.835],
    scale=[0.10, 0.005, 0.05],
)
apply_api_schema(prim_path="/World/Box/WallFront", schema_name="PhysicsCollisionAPI")
set_attribute(prim_path="/World/Box/WallFront", attr_name="primvars:displayColor", value=[[0.70, 0.50, 0.25]])

create_prim(
    prim_path="/World/Box/WallBack",
    prim_type="Cube",
    position=[-0.25, 0.10, 0.835],
    scale=[0.10, 0.005, 0.05],
)
apply_api_schema(prim_path="/World/Box/WallBack", schema_name="PhysicsCollisionAPI")
set_attribute(prim_path="/World/Box/WallBack", attr_name="primvars:displayColor", value=[[0.70, 0.50, 0.25]])

create_prim(
    prim_path="/World/Box/WallLeft",
    prim_type="Cube",
    position=[-0.35, 0.20, 0.835],
    scale=[0.005, 0.10, 0.05],
)
apply_api_schema(prim_path="/World/Box/WallLeft", schema_name="PhysicsCollisionAPI")
set_attribute(prim_path="/World/Box/WallLeft", attr_name="primvars:displayColor", value=[[0.70, 0.50, 0.25]])

create_prim(
    prim_path="/World/Box/WallRight",
    prim_type="Cube",
    position=[-0.15, 0.20, 0.835],
    scale=[0.005, 0.10, 0.05],
)
apply_api_schema(prim_path="/World/Box/WallRight", schema_name="PhysicsCollisionAPI")
set_attribute(prim_path="/World/Box/WallRight", attr_name="primvars:displayColor", value=[[0.70, 0.50, 0.25]])

# Confirm box assembly: should report 5 child prims under /World/Box.
count_prims_under_path(parent_path="/World/Box")

# ── Three items inside infeed bin ────────────────────────────────────────────
# 0.04m cubes, mass 0.05 kg, rubber material for friction.
item_paths = ["/World/Item_1", "/World/Item_2", "/World/Item_3"]
item_positions = [
    [0.24, 0.30, 0.835],   # Item_1 front-left of bin
    [0.30, 0.30, 0.835],   # Item_2 centre of bin
    [0.36, 0.30, 0.835],   # Item_3 front-right of bin
]
item_labels = ["electronics_widget", "consumable_tube", "sealed_bag"]

for path, pos, label in zip(item_paths, item_positions, item_labels):
    create_prim(prim_path=path, prim_type="Cube", position=pos, size=0.04)
    for api in ("PhysicsRigidBodyAPI", "PhysicsCollisionAPI", "PhysicsMassAPI", "PhysxRigidBodyAPI"):
        apply_api_schema(prim_path=path, schema_name=api)
    set_semantic_label(prim_path=path, label=label, class_name="pack_item")

bulk_set_attribute(
    prim_paths=item_paths,
    attr="physics:mass",
    value=0.05,
)
bulk_set_attribute(
    prim_paths=item_paths,
    attr="physxRigidBody:sleepThreshold",
    value=0.0,
)
for path in item_paths:
    apply_physics_material(prim_path=path, material_name="rubber")

# ── Lid (flat 0.20×0.20×0.01m cube on stash position) ────────────────────────
# Stash z: table_top(0.75) + lid_thickness/2(0.005) + clearance(0.07) = 0.825
# So lid centre at 0.825; lid bottom = 0.820, top = 0.830.
create_prim(
    prim_path="/World/Lid",
    prim_type="Cube",
    position=[-0.25, -0.25, 0.825],
    scale=[0.10, 0.10, 0.005],
)
for api in ("PhysicsRigidBodyAPI", "PhysicsCollisionAPI", "PhysicsMassAPI", "PhysxRigidBodyAPI"):
    apply_api_schema(prim_path="/World/Lid", schema_name=api)
set_attribute(prim_path="/World/Lid", attr_name="physics:mass", value=0.10)
set_attribute(prim_path="/World/Lid", attr_name="primvars:displayColor", value=[[0.55, 0.40, 0.20]])
apply_physics_material(prim_path="/World/Lid", material_name="rubber")
set_semantic_label(prim_path="/World/Lid", label="box_lid", class_name="pack_lid")

# Lid is wide+flat — declare a top-down grasp pose so the gripper approaches
# from above the broad face rather than a side edge.
define_grasp_pose(
    robot_path="/World/Franka",
    object_path="/World/Lid",
    approach_direction=[0, 0, -1],
    gripper_offset=[0, 0, 0],
)

# ── PHASE 1: pack the three items into the open box ──────────────────────────
# drop_targets distribute items into 3 distinct cells inside box interior.
# Cells: (front-left, front-right, back-centre) — separated by 0.08-0.10m.
setup_pick_place_controller(
    robot_path="/World/Franka",
    target_source="curobo",
    robot_family="franka",
    source_paths=item_paths,
    destination_path="/World/Box",
    drop_targets={
        "/World/Item_1": [-0.30, 0.16, 0.820],
        "/World/Item_2": [-0.20, 0.16, 0.820],
        "/World/Item_3": [-0.25, 0.24, 0.820],
    },
    planning_obstacles=[
        "/World/Table",
        "/World/InfeedBin",
        "/World/Box/Bottom",
        "/World/Box/WallFront",
        "/World/Box/WallBack",
        "/World/Box/WallLeft",
        "/World/Box/WallRight",
        "/World/Lid",
    ],
)

# Verify each item reached its assigned cell.
for path in item_paths:
    get_world_transform(prim_path=path)

# ── PHASE 2: pick the lid and place it on top of the box (seal) ──────────────
# drop_target z = wall_top(0.885) + lid_thickness/2(0.005) = 0.890
# Note: packed items are NOT obstacles here — they are cargo inside the box.
setup_pick_place_controller(
    robot_path="/World/Franka",
    target_source="curobo",
    robot_family="franka",
    source_paths=["/World/Lid"],
    destination_path="/World/Box",
    drop_targets={
        "/World/Lid": [-0.25, 0.20, 0.890],
    },
    planning_obstacles=[
        "/World/Table",
        "/World/InfeedBin",
        "/World/Box/WallFront",
        "/World/Box/WallBack",
        "/World/Box/WallLeft",
        "/World/Box/WallRight",
    ],
)

# Verify lid landed flush on the wall rim.
get_world_transform(prim_path="/World/Lid")
failure_modes: Items overlap inside box (poor packing) — drop_targets cells are 0.08-0.10m centre-to-centre with 0.04m items, leaving 0.04-0.06m clearance. If cuRobo's release height is too high, settling items can roll and one cell may end up occupied by two items. Mitigation: tighten release with explicit drop_z=0.820 (just above bottom plate), and add a 1-2 step sim_control between item placements so each settles before the next descends.

Box tips when reaching for far corner — box walls have PhysicsCollisionAPI but no RigidBodyAPI, so they cannot tip (treated as static obstacle). However if a future variant adds RigidBodyAPI to the box for dynamic interactions, lateral gripper contact during reach to /World/Item_3 (back-centre cell) can topple the enclosure. Mitigation: keep walls static OR add a PhysicsFixedJoint anchoring /World/Box to /World/Table.

Lid placed misaligned (overhangs edge) — lid footprint matches box interior exactly (0.20×0.20m). xy-tolerance in cuRobo drop is typically 0.01-0.02m, so the lid may end up 1-2cm off-centre. Mitigation: tune simulate_args.xy_tolerance to 0.04m (allows misalignment), OR enforce a tighter drop via explicit drop_target at exact box-centre xy + tighter gripper_close on the lid release phase.

Lid lands on partially-settled items — if Phase 2 begins before Phase 1 items have fully settled in their cells, the lid descent at z=0.890 may collide with an item that bounced up to z>0.860. Mitigation: insert sim_control(action='step', step_count=60) between the two setup_pick_place_controller calls to allow items to settle (~1s sim-time).

Dual setup_pick_place_controller calls share the Franka articulation — second call must re-bind the controller to /World/Franka after the first phase completes. Pattern verified in CP-NEW-machine-tender-load-unload + CP-NEW-yrkesroll-machinist-cnc-load (same shape). Risk: an exec_sync executor that does not flush the first controller state may carry over stale gripper-closed state into Phase 2; rely on setup_pick_place_controller's idempotent re-binding.

Box walls as 4 separate Cube prims — planning_obstacles list includes all 4 walls + bottom. cuRobo collision-checks each separately; the resulting collision-sphere set is large (5 prims × N spheres). If cuRobo solver times out on Phase 1, simplify by parenting all walls under /World/Box and passing only /World/Box as obstacle (relies on cuRobo recursive child traversal).

define_grasp_pose for /World/Lid uses approach_direction=[0,0,-1] (top-down). Franka's default ParallelGripper max opening is ~0.08m; the lid is 0.20m wide along both X and Y, so a side-grip is impossible — the grasp must approach from above the flat face. If pickup fails with 'gripper too wide for object', sub in a flat suction-style grasp via a vacuum gripper variant (not exercised in this canonical).

Wall thickness 0.005m (×2 = 0.01m) is at the lower bound of stable PhysX collision resolution. If items dropped from height penetrate walls during settle, increase wall thickness to scale x=0.010 (= 0.02m total). Documented; not modified here to keep visual proportions realistic.

box_assembly.note: Container Xform with 5 child Cubes (bottom + 4 walls). Walls are static colliders, no RigidBodyAPI.

lid.note: Flat cube matching box interior footprint; top-grasp pose.

items.note: Item order matches pack-cell order; Item_N → cell_N.

operator_role.title: Manual Packer / Box-Sealer
operator_role.onet_soc_note: 53-7064 (Packers and Packagers, Hand) is the direct ONET match for manual-pack-into-box + lid-seal workflows; no substitution needed. Adjacent code 51-9111 (Packaging and Filling Machine Operators and Tenders) is preferred when the workflow is automated machine-tending (filler / capper); 53-7064 used here for the hand-pack workflow with robot assist.

code_template:
create_prim(prim_path="/World/DomeLight", prim_type="DomeLight")
set_attribute(prim_path="/World/DomeLight", attr_name="inputs:intensity", value=1000.0)
create_prim(prim_path="/World/Ground", prim_type="Cube", position=[0, 0, -0.5], scale=[20, 20, 1])
apply_api_schema(prim_path="/World/Ground", schema_name="PhysicsCollisionAPI")
create_prim(prim_path="/World/Table", prim_type="Cube", position=[0, 0, 0.375], scale=[0.5, 0.3, 0.375])
apply_api_schema(prim_path="/World/Table", schema_name="PhysicsCollisionAPI")
set_physics_scene_config(config={"enable_gpu_dynamics": False, "broadphase_type": "MBP"})
robot_wizard(robot_name={{primary_robot.class}}, dest_path={{primary_robot.path}}, position={{primary_robot.position}}, orientation={{primary_robot.orientation}})
create_bin(prim_path={{infeed_bin.path}}, position={{infeed_bin.position}}, size={{infeed_bin.size}})
create_prim(prim_path={{box_assembly.path}}, prim_type="Xform")
create_prim(prim_path={{box_assembly.bottom.path}}, prim_type="Cube", position={{box_assembly.bottom.position}}, scale={{box_assembly.bottom.scale}})
apply_api_schema(prim_path={{box_assembly.bottom.path}}, schema_name="PhysicsCollisionAPI")
create_prim(prim_path={{box_assembly.wall_front.path}}, prim_type="Cube", position={{box_assembly.wall_front.position}}, scale={{box_assembly.wall_front.scale}})
apply_api_schema(prim_path={{box_assembly.wall_front.path}}, schema_name="PhysicsCollisionAPI")
create_prim(prim_path={{box_assembly.wall_back.path}}, prim_type="Cube", position={{box_assembly.wall_back.position}}, scale={{box_assembly.wall_back.scale}})
apply_api_schema(prim_path={{box_assembly.wall_back.path}}, schema_name="PhysicsCollisionAPI")
create_prim(prim_path={{box_assembly.wall_left.path}}, prim_type="Cube", position={{box_assembly.wall_left.position}}, scale={{box_assembly.wall_left.scale}})
apply_api_schema(prim_path={{box_assembly.wall_left.path}}, schema_name="PhysicsCollisionAPI")
create_prim(prim_path={{box_assembly.wall_right.path}}, prim_type="Cube", position={{box_assembly.wall_right.position}}, scale={{box_assembly.wall_right.scale}})
apply_api_schema(prim_path={{box_assembly.wall_right.path}}, schema_name="PhysicsCollisionAPI")
count_prims_under_path(parent_path={{box_assembly.path}})
item_paths = [{{items[0].path}}, {{items[1].path}}, {{items[2].path}}]
create_prim(prim_path={{items[0].path}}, prim_type="Cube", position={{items[0].position}}, size=0.04)
for api in ("PhysicsRigidBodyAPI", "PhysicsCollisionAPI", "PhysicsMassAPI", "PhysxRigidBodyAPI"):
    apply_api_schema(prim_path={{items[0].path}}, schema_name=api)
set_semantic_label(prim_path={{items[0].path}}, label={{items[0].label}}, class_name="pack_item")
create_prim(prim_path={{items[1].path}}, prim_type="Cube", position={{items[1].position}}, size=0.04)
for api in ("PhysicsRigidBodyAPI", "PhysicsCollisionAPI", "PhysicsMassAPI", "PhysxRigidBodyAPI"):
    apply_api_schema(prim_path={{items[1].path}}, schema_name=api)
set_semantic_label(prim_path={{items[1].path}}, label={{items[1].label}}, class_name="pack_item")
create_prim(prim_path={{items[2].path}}, prim_type="Cube", position={{items[2].position}}, size=0.04)
for api in ("PhysicsRigidBodyAPI", "PhysicsCollisionAPI", "PhysicsMassAPI", "PhysxRigidBodyAPI"):
    apply_api_schema(prim_path={{items[2].path}}, schema_name=api)
set_semantic_label(prim_path={{items[2].path}}, label={{items[2].label}}, class_name="pack_item")
bulk_set_attribute(prim_paths=item_paths, attr="physics:mass", value=0.05)
bulk_set_attribute(prim_paths=item_paths, attr="physxRigidBody:sleepThreshold", value=0.0)
for path in item_paths:
    apply_physics_material(prim_path=path, material_name="rubber")
create_prim(prim_path={{lid.path}}, prim_type="Cube", position={{lid.position}}, scale={{lid.scale}})
for api in ("PhysicsRigidBodyAPI", "PhysicsCollisionAPI", "PhysicsMassAPI", "PhysxRigidBodyAPI"):
    apply_api_schema(prim_path={{lid.path}}, schema_name=api)
set_attribute(prim_path={{lid.path}}, attr_name="physics:mass", value={{lid.mass}})
apply_physics_material(prim_path={{lid.path}}, material_name={{lid.material}})
set_semantic_label(prim_path={{lid.path}}, label={{lid.label}}, class_name="pack_lid")
define_grasp_pose(robot_path={{primary_robot.path}}, object_path={{lid.path}}, approach_direction=[0, 0, -1], gripper_offset=[0, 0, 0])
setup_pick_place_controller(
    robot_path={{primary_robot.path}},
    target_source="curobo",
    robot_family={{primary_robot.family}},
    source_paths=item_paths,
    destination_path={{box_assembly.path}},
    drop_targets={
        {{items[0].path}}: {{items[0].drop_target}},
        {{items[1].path}}: {{items[1].drop_target}},
        {{items[2].path}}: {{items[2].drop_target}},
    },
    planning_obstacles=["/World/Table", {{infeed_bin.path}}, {{box_assembly.bottom.path}}, {{box_assembly.wall_front.path}}, {{box_assembly.wall_back.path}}, {{box_assembly.wall_left.path}}, {{box_assembly.wall_right.path}}, {{lid.path}}],
)
for path in item_paths:
    get_world_transform(prim_path=path)
setup_pick_place_controller(
    robot_path={{primary_robot.path}},
    target_source="curobo",
    robot_family={{primary_robot.family}},
    source_paths=[{{lid.path}}],
    destination_path={{box_assembly.path}},
    drop_targets={
        {{lid.path}}: {{lid.drop_target}},
    },
    planning_obstacles=["/World/Table", {{infeed_bin.path}}, {{box_assembly.wall_front.path}}, {{box_assembly.wall_back.path}}, {{box_assembly.wall_left.path}}, {{box_assembly.wall_right.path}}],
)
get_world_transform(prim_path={{lid.path}})
